name: houserental-backend
description: Backend API for YENE BET PWA

scripts.kill:5000: taskkill /f /im node.exe 2>nul || echo 'No Node.js processes found on port 5000'
scripts.kill:5001: taskkill /f /im node.exe 2>nul || echo 'No Node.js processes found on port 5001'
scripts.kill:all: taskkill /f /im node.exe 2>nul || echo 'No Node.js processes found'
scripts.setup:env: echo 'Creating .env file...' && if not exist .env.example (echo 'JWT_SECRET=your_super_secret_jwt_key_change_in_production_2024' && echo 'REFRESH_SECRET=your_refresh_secret_change_in_production_2024' && echo 'MONGODB_URI=mongodb+srv://username:password@cluster.mongodb.net/dbname?retryWrites=true&w=majority' && echo 'FRONTEND_URL=http://localhost:5173' && echo 'NODE_ENV=development') > .env.example
scripts.logs: echo 'Checking recent logs...' && echo 'Check the console output above for server logs'
scripts.clean:restart: npm run port:kill-all && npm run dev
scripts.dev:clean: npm run port:auto-fix && npm run dev
